title: So I picked up a copy of the Red Cross Book
display_title: So I picked up a copy of the Red Cross Book
wikitext:
[]: So I picked up a copy of the Red Cross Book...             Quote Post by hybridsoldier » Tue Jan 02, 2007 7:09 pm Is there anyway to tell if its real or not? I was just wondering if it was ever pirated to cash in on ebay. Also I was wondering if posting scans of the pages was a no-no since it's copyrighted material and all? Thanks for any help!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 02, 2007 7:56 pm I wasn't aware any of the Eva books were sought after enough to be forged.
